Uses of Interface
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.TaskExecutionListener

Packages that use TaskExecutionListener
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener
Stream-based batch listener components for Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
Stream-based task lifecycle listener support for Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation
Annotation-based listener support for Spring Cloud Task.

  • Uses of TaskExecutionListener in org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener

    Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener that implement TaskExecutionListener
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TaskBatchExecutionListener
    Responsible for storing the relationship between a Spring Batch job and the Spring Cloud task it was executed within.

  • Uses of TaskExecutionListener in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation

    Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation that implement TaskExecutionListener
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TaskListenerExecutor
    Identifies all beans that contain a TaskExecutionListener annotation and stores the associated method so that it can be called by the TaskExecutionListener at the appropriate time.
